description: Covers damages or loss to your house and its contents due to accidents, fire, theft, or natural disasters.

coverage.structural_damage: Covers damages to the building structure from fire, storm, earthquake, or accidental impact.
coverage.contents: Covers furniture, appliances, electronics inside the house.
coverage.liability: Covers accidents occurring on the property affecting visitors.

exclusions: Damage due to war or civil unrest
user_responsibilities: Provide photos of the house and its contents
